title: xyris angustifolia
intro: Xyris angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Xyris angustifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Xyris angustifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
